evaluations.narrative_feedback: Agent demonstrated strong structural compliance and maintained protective belt integrity. Argument quality was solid with well-sourced claims. Falsification attempts were partially effective but could be more targeted.

agreements: Both parties agree that AI automation affects labor markets
disagreements: Disagreement on net employment effect: positive vs. negative
novel_positions: The concept of task-level displacement rather than job-level displacement
open_questions: What is the optimal retraining timeline for displaced workers?
